purpose: Engineering-ready Montreal grocery retailer research for student-focused grocery optimization.

scope.strategy: Prioritize retailers with digital flyer, catalog, or pricing surfaces. Exclude long-tail stores with no durable price surface from MVP data pipelines.

useful.summary: Use retailer master data to expand Montreal chain awareness beyond the original five chains.
useful.implementation: Adds supported Montreal chains and a retailer intelligence endpoint/UI panel.

useful.summary: Use verified anchor stores with coordinates as routing/store seeds.
useful.implementation: Adds T&T Ville St-Laurent, Akhavan NDG, and Supermarche PA du Parc to Montreal stores.

useful.summary: Use weighted priority ranking to guide provider order and UI messaging.
useful.implementation: Ranks Maxi, Super C, IGA, Metro, Provigo, and Walmart as Tier 1.

useful.summary: Use tiered source strategy to separate MVP pricing coverage from later ethnic/niche coverage.
useful.implementation: Adds provider templates and launch checklist items for official/partner feeds.

not_useful_for_direct_build.reason: Island store counts are estimates and should not drive routing or user-facing exact claims.
The workbook identifies some high-leverage routes as ToS-gray or unstable. These should stay disabled until partner/legal review.
Costco, Dollarama, H Mart, public markets, and unverified Newon/Hawaii entries are not strong MVP data surfaces.
Full store coordinates should come from official locators or Google Places rather than manual estimates.

priority_retailers.recommended_surface: Loblaw PC Express plus flyer feed
Metro/Super C flyer and promo feed
Loblaw PC Express plus flyer feed

acquisition_tiers.label: Tier 1 - MVP
acquisition_tiers.cadence: Weekly flyer refresh plus nightly staple price re-check
acquisition_tiers.method: Use official/partner feed where possible. Keep undocumented flyer backends disabled unless reviewed.
acquisition_tiers.why: Highest student relevance, cheapest baskets, and broadest coverage per integration.

acquisition_tiers.label: Tier 2 - Ethnic value
acquisition_tiers.method: Own e-commerce, public flyers, OCR extraction, and store locator refresh.
acquisition_tiers.why: Differentiates the app with produce, meat, and cultural-staple value near campuses.

acquisition_tiers.label: Tier 3 - Niche / organic
acquisition_tiers.method: Own e-commerce/flyer pages and partner feeds where present.
acquisition_tiers.why: Useful for completeness, but lower student volume and often higher prices.

flyer_sources.primary_route: Own site plus partner flyer feed
Own site plus partner flyer feed
Own site plus partner flyer feed
Own site plus partner flyer feed
Own site plus partner flyer feed

flyer_sources.cadence: Weekly flyer and regular price checks
flyer_sources.format: Structured catalog if partner access is available

launch_tasks_from_workbook: Confirm exact Island-of-Montreal counts from official store locators before publishing count claims.
Choose official or licensed pricing data before enabling ToS-gray flyer/scraper routes.
Use Google Places API or official locator JSON for full store coordinate refresh.
Implement weekly Thursday flyer refresh for Tier 1 retailers.
Add OCR/PDF flyer extraction only after Tier 1 e-commerce/flyer provider coverage is stable.
